Blue Zones Health (BZH) and ASU Partnered to Develop and Deliver A

Public Service (PS) - activity is primarily ASU-led education, training, or public programming.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Blue Zones Health (BZH) and ASU partnered to develop and deliver a foundational learning experience designed to increase awareness and understanding of Blue Zones principles among clinicians and affiliated healthcare staff. The program provides participants with practical insights into the lifest...
